title: Automate off of checkbox column
excerpt:
Description
Ability to automate off of the checkbox column - currently the Checkbox column can’t be used in monday automations, forcing us to update our boards with different column types.

…

posts.author: brookejarchow (Brooke Jarchow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to automate off of the checkbox column - currently the Checkbox column can’t be used in monday automations, forcing us to update our boards with different column types.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to automate and use checkbox column in automations.

posts.author: AshcroftJewellery (Christian Fox )
posts.cookedHtml:
I use a checkbox in one of my automations.

When Column (Checkbox) Changes, then, [rest of automation]

There’s also an automation for “When Button clicked” - button being another useful column for things like this.

Hopefully this can help your needs.

posts.author: JonahScott (Jonah Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree; automating checkbox columns is essential for streamlined workflows. Utilizing status columns or integrating with platforms like Make can offer effective workarounds until native support is available.
